reasoning: The control AU-16(3) focuses on cross-organizational audit logging with an emphasis on disassociability. In Kubernetes, audit logging can be configured to capture detailed logs of API requests, which can be used for cross-organizational auditing. Ensuring that audit logs are enabled, retained appropriately, and capture necessary metadata aligns with the control's intent. Additionally, configuring audit logs to support disassociability (e.g., by ensuring logs do not directly link to specific users without additional context) can be part of the audit policy configuration.
title: Cross-Organizational Audit Logging - Cross - organizational auditing | disassociability implement [ assignment
